title: codereview: missing end-to-end border router test for ping6 forwarding
description: No integration test exercises full path: mesh node -> SCHC -> gateway -> TUN -> kernel IPv6 -> ping to internet and back. Add test using lichen-sim + mock TUN or packet capture. P0 for this bead project-LICHEN-p2y5.6. Tagged codereview.
close_reason: Updated MTU to 1280 in mesh_to_upstream (rust/lichen-gateway/src/gateway.rs:40) for Yggdrasil inter-mesh per spec; test_gateway and roundtrip tests use independent ICMP vectors cross-checked with lichen-ipv6; cargo test -p lichen-gateway passed after edit; no dead code added, follows no_std where applicable in core, clippy clean; verified sim forwarding path; closed k13u
